"use strict"; exports.__esModule = true; exports["default"] = ensureObject; function ensureObject(obj) { for (var _len = arguments.length, props = new Array(_len > 1 ? _len - 1 : 0), _key = 1; _key < _len; _key++) { props[_key - 1] = arguments[_key]; } while (props.length > 0) { var prop = props.shift(); if (!obj[prop]) { obj[prop] = {}; } obj = obj[prop]; } } module.exports = exports.default;
